name: Goods Description
text: The Seller shall supply to the Purchaser the goods specifically described and specified in this Agreement, which shall conform to the agreed standards and specifications.

legal_basis.note: Sale by description — goods must correspond
BIS mandatory certification for notified goods

invalid_if: The description of goods is vague, uncertain, or incomplete.
title: Goods Description
dispute_hotspots: Goods described by sample — SGA 1930 S.15: goods must correspond to sample
Goods described by description — SGA 1930 S.15: implied condition of correspondence
BIS mandatory certification — goods without BIS mark constitute unlawful sale
Legal Metrology Act — mandatory labelling for packed goods
